steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The notes directly state: “A river with high sinuosity has many meanders.” This phrase provides the essential information to define the term.

steps.title: Match the definition to the choices
steps.content: B directly states the definition: a high-sinuosity river “is one that has many meanders,” and it clarifies that meanders are “U-shaped curves.” The others either add unnecessary behavioral details, misrepresent causality, or focus on a specific example rather than providing a general definition. That matches choice B — B is correct.
